title: Create a New Board in Custom Recipes
excerpt: Is it possible to have “create a new board” in a custom recipe for automations?  I can only find it as a preset automation triggered by a status change.

posts.author: ChristianD (Christian Delfino)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to have “create a new board” in a custom recipe for automations? I can only find it as a preset automation triggered by a status change.

posts.author: andrewalmand (Andrew Almand)
posts.cookedHtml:
@ChristianD Welcome to the Monday Community!

That automation isn’t yet available for custom building https://view.monday.com/1092205827-f4c654f1e91a8e4e76eedbb64150c940?r=use1 Its in the works currently for this year though.

In the meantime, you could accomplish this with a two stage automation though. Build you custom one first to change a status and then have that status change to create the new board. So you will want to add a new Status column and then an extra Automation, but it should accomplish what you need all the same.

Let me know if you need help setting it up!
